description_long: This doll depicts a humanoid, bird-like figure with a dark, almost charcoal-black body and elongated limbs. Its head is sharply angular and beak-like, with no visible facial features, giving it an enigmatic and slightly menacing appearance. The doll is dressed in tattered, layered garments resembling a mix of medieval and post-apocalyptic fashion, with a high collar and a skirt-like lower garment. Several bone-like protrusions or rods are attached to its waist, and it holds a grotesque, fleshy object in one hand, adding to its eerie aesthetic. The legs are digitigrade, ending in clawed, bird-like feet, and the arms are long and thin, with clawed hands. The overall design suggests a fantasy or horror theme, making it a striking and unusual figure for urban storytelling.
description: A dark, bird-like humanoid doll with elongated limbs, tattered layered clothing, and bone-like accessories, holding a grotesque object in one hand.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's angular, beak-like head, high-collared garment, bone-like waist accessories, and the fleshy object held in its right hand.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sharp profile of the head, the layered clothing, and the protruding accessories at the waist.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the high collar, the skirt-like garment, and the arrangement of bone-like rods around the waist.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the left arm and leg, the side profile of the head, and the fleshy object hanging from the right hand.
attribute_clothing_style: Tattered, layered garments with a high collar and skirt-like lower section, in dark, muted colors, accented by bone-like accessories at the waist; the style blends medieval, fantasy, and post-apocalyptic influences.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms slightly bent at the elbows, right arm holding a fleshy object, legs straight and digitigrade, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: No visible facial features or expression; the head is smooth and beak-like, giving an emotionless, enigmatic appearance.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is sculpted into a sharp, feathered or spiked form.
